ValidationRule.description: MIS-6229 MIS-5894 MIS-5825 MIS-5675 CRM hygiene
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT(ISNEW()), ISBLANK(Country), ISBLANK(TEXT(LeadSource)), RecordType.DeveloperName <> 'Wolves', NOT(CONTAINS($User.FirstName , 'Integration')), NOT(CONTAINS($User.LastName , 'Integration')), NOT(ischanged(BI_Data__c)), NOT(ISCHANGED( Status )), NOT(ISCHANGED(Last_Activity_Date_by_GTM__c)), NOT(ISCHANGED(Last_Activity_Date_by_MIR__c)), $Profile.Name <> 'System Administrator', $Profile.Name <> 'SW SalesOps', $Profile.Name <> 'SW SalesOps Extended', $Profile.Name <> 'Integration User', $Profile.Name <> 'Integration User No DF', $Profile.Name <> 'SW Consultants', $Profile.Name <> 'SW Marketing Ops', $User.Id <> '005b0000000lqbn' /*automation user*/ )
